app.subtitle: Strait of Hormuz passability monitor
status.title: Passability
status.tickerEmpty: Waiting for ships to cross the narrows…
ais.disabled: Live AIS layer is off (no API key configured)
ais.noCoverage: AIS stream connected, but no terrestrial receivers are reporting from the Gulf region right now — mid-crisis blackout. Transit data comes from IMF PortWatch.
markets.title: Markets
markets.oddsDesc: Polymarket: traffic returns to normal by Jul 31
news.title: News pressure
news.explainer: How loudly world media talks about the strait — 24h article volume vs. a calm-2025 baseline; feeds the index's News component.
news.empty: No headlines yet — GDELT is currently unreachable from our server; the news relay delivers data every 30 minutes.
hilkka.title: What this means for Kerttu
hilkka.tank: Petrol (E95) is {price} €/L — filling a {liters} L tank costs {delta} vs pre-crisis February
hilkka.driving: Driving {km} km/month costs {delta} per month extra in petrol
hilkka.diesel: Diesel is {price} €/L — a tank costs {delta} vs February
hilkka.elec: Spot electricity right now: {now} c/kWh (30-day average {avg} c/kWh) — Finland's power mix makes the Hormuz link weak; we chart it to test the correlation
hilkka.brent: Brent crude is {pct} % vs its pre-crisis February average
hilkka.persona: Kerttu Korhonen drives a petrol car ({liters} L/100 km, {km} km/month). Pump prices: Statistics Finland monthly averages, latest {month}.
hilkka.lag: Fast proxies react in minutes; national statistics lag months — and many other things move them too.
hilkka.heatoil: Heating oil is {price} €/L — filling a {liters} L tank costs {delta} vs pre-crisis February
layers.title: Live layers
welcome.title: What is this?
welcome.intro: salmi watches the Strait of Hormuz: is it open, and what does that mean — for oil markets, and for everyday life in Finland.
welcome.serious: Daily transit counts (IMF PortWatch, official), Finnish prices (Statistics Finland, pörssisähkö), Brent daily closes.
welcome.editorial: The Passability Index and its bands are our own published formula on top of that data — versioned and fully explained under "How is this computed?".
welcome.bestEffort: Live ship AIS (terrestrial receivers — currently largely dark in the Gulf, mid-crisis), flights (OpenSky), news volume (GDELT, rate-limited), intraday quotes (unofficial). Gaps are shown, never hidden.
welcome.footer: A one-person civic hobby project on free public data. Not navigation or trading advice.
timeline.title: Timeline
timeline.explainer: Every series we hold real history for, overlaid on one 0–100 index so you can see what moves together — hover any line for its real value and unit, click a legend entry to hide it. Dashed lines mark the same hand-curated events as the Brent chart. Ships/flights history only started accumulating on launch day, so those two are short for now.
